<!here> Hey everyone, I wanted to share the responsibility breakdown of our partnerships team, so you all know who to route your inquiries to! Let me know if you have any questions.
*Nishka - Coordinates 3rd Party Engagement/Outreach*
    ◦ New partnerships
    ◦ New integrations
    ◦ OAuth app procurement
*Prad - Internal Partnership enablement*
    ◦ Manages internal partnership tools
    ◦ Automation efforts
    ◦ Process ownership
*Aidan - Partnership team roadmap & escalations*

Hey all — do we have a current contact/path with Employment Hero to ask about OAuth app scope changes? A customer is asking whether we can add a scope to our Employment Hero OAuth credentials, but it looks like the dev portal isn't enabled anymore. Eng last reached out around October and didn't hear back, so I wanted to check how feasible this is / who we should route through.

Getting Workday badge certified or at least our integration reviewed? Its not like a blocker for customers but just like large enterprise customers want these partnerships

Hi! A customer was asking if their existing linked accounts will get disconnected with Hibob marketplace migration. My understanding (based on this thread but not sure if anything has changed since) is existing basic-auth linked accounts are expected to keep working for a period before needing relink. Hey subteam Yash Gogri — inbound from EmpirioLabs asking to be listed as a provider on the Merge Gateway.
My take is we should not do a named listing since it's effectively gateway-on-gateway, which adds complexity (routing/latency, support ownership, observability). Does that match your view?

Hello, AON mentioned that Paylocity is asking some of their customers to fill out an additional form (on top of the Web Services form) called "Paylocity Automate Data Exchange / API" (adding a copy in the thread). Have we seen this before, or do we know when/why Paylocity might require it?
It seems like this adds an extra step to obtaining Paylocity API credentials, so I wanted to check whether we're aware of it and whether we should proactively flag it to other customers working with Paylocity.
